findings.description: S3 bucket 'ecommerce-media-prod' allows public read access via bucket ACL. Contains user-uploaded product images and potentially sensitive documents.
findings.remediation: Enable S3 Block Public Access at account and bucket level. Set bucket ACL to private. Use CloudFront OAI for public content delivery.

findings.description: ECS task role has AdministratorAccess managed policy attached. Any compromised container can access all AWS services and data.
findings.remediation: Apply least-privilege IAM policy. Create separate task roles per service (user-svc-role, payment-svc-role, catalog-svc-role) with only required permissions.

findings.description: RDS instance is not publicly accessible. Located in private subnet with security group restricting access to ECS tasks only.
ElastiCache Redis cluster does not have automatic backups enabled. Session data and shopping cart state could be lost.
findings.remediation: Enable automatic backups with 7-day retention. Configure snapshot window during low-traffic hours.

findings.description: ElastiCache Redis replication group does not enforce encryption in transit (TLS). Session tokens transmitted in plaintext within VPC.
findings.remediation: Enable in-transit encryption. Update all Redis client connections to use TLS. Rotate session tokens after enabling encryption.

findings.description: Payment service ECS task definition does not configure CloudWatch log driver. Payment processing events are not being captured for audit.
findings.remediation: Add awslogs log driver configuration to task definition. Set log group with 365-day retention for PCI compliance.

findings.description: Lambda function is not publicly accessible. Invoked only by SQS trigger within VPC.
CloudFront distribution allows TLSv1.0 connections. TLSv1.0 has known vulnerabilities (POODLE, BEAST).
findings.remediation: Set minimum protocol version to TLSv1.2_2021. Update viewer protocol policy to HTTPS-only.

findings.description: Database password secret does not have automatic rotation enabled. Static credentials increase risk of compromise.
findings.remediation: Enable automatic rotation with 30-day interval using Lambda rotation function.

findings.description: WAF WebACL does not have logging enabled. Cannot audit blocked requests or tune rules without visibility.
findings.remediation: Enable WAF logging to S3 or CloudWatch Logs. Create dashboard for blocked requests analysis.
